articles.title: ASUS Republic of Gamers Announces Strix OLED XG34WCDMS and Strix XG129C - ASUS Pressroom
articles.description: ROG announces the Strix OLED XG34WCDMS, a 34-inch 280Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor, and the versatile Strix XG129C secondary touchscreen display. Subscribe to ASUS Pressroom for the latest tech updates!
articles.content:
34-inch 280Hz RGB Tandem QD-OLED ultrawide monitor and versatile 12.3-inch touchscreen secondary display expand the ROG display lineup

articles.title: Nintendo Announces $50 Switch 2 Price Increase as Pokémon Pokopia Crosses 4 Million Sales - TechPowerUp
